title: Rich Hot Chocolate
description: Thick, velvety hot chocolate made with real chocolate — not cocoa powder. Pure indulgence in a mug.

ingredients.item: whipped cream, mini marshmallows, or chocolate shavings

steps.instruction: Heat milk in a small saucepan over medium-low heat until steaming but not boiling.
Whisk in cocoa powder and sugar until dissolved.
Add the chopped chocolate and whisk continuously until fully melted and smooth.
Stir in vanilla, salt, and a pinch of cayenne if using.
Pour into mugs and top with whipped cream or marshmallows. Serve immediately.

notes: The quality of chocolate makes all the difference. Use a good chocolate bar — skip the chocolate chips as they have stabilizers that affect texture.
